title: Angry Hogs Remastered
description: Retexture of all forms of pigs in the style of the "Angry birds" game series.
body:
### ABOUT 
The texture pack replaces regular pigs, piglins and hoglins, as well as their zombie versions, with their relatives from the Angry Birds series of games.

### CHANGES
- pig texture
- piglin texture 
- texture of brutal piglins 
- texture of zombified piglins 
- hoglin texture 
- zoglin texture 
- texture of porkchop and cooked porkchop

### USAGE 
Sure, but give credit by name and link to this project

### NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED
